body:
Woke, swept while-asleep changes. Suite 414 green/floor True (no regression). TWO HIGH items + owner attention needed. Full record: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_WAKE_AUDIT_ORBI_EXECUTOR_AND_SECRET_LEAK_2026-06-14.md.

=== 1) ORBI EXECUTOR (ai_chi/orbi/executor.py) — APPROVED AS SIMULATED/INERT SCAFFOLD ONLY, not a live executor ===
Verified reassuring: ALL handlers are SIMULATED (fs.write returns bytes_written without writing; shell.run returns 'simulated execution' without running; fs.read simulated). NO os/subprocess/open/socket imported — it cannot touch fs/shell/network/hardware. Gate-first (policy_gate.evaluate before any handler). Hardware exclusion zones present (pixhawk, can0/can1, /etc, /sys, /proc, docker, /opt/omni-ai). Fail-closed. test_orbi_executor.py present.
FINDINGS (must hold before it ever goes real):
- O1 (HIGH, framing/governance): the name + the state-doc removal of 'Orbi executor' from the STOP-GATE list OVERSTATE this. It's a SIMULATED stub, not a live actor. The live-execution gate has NOT been crossed (handlers are stubs), but the doc now reads as if Orbi can act. CORRECT the record: 'Orbi Executor — simulated stub built; live handlers remain STOP-GATED.'
- O2 (HIGH, latent): _is_restricted_target inspects only proposal.target, NOT proposal.args. shell.run's payload is in args, so target='echo' + args touching pixhawk//etc would PASS. shell.run as an allowlisted action_type is RCE-shaped. Before any real handler: scan args too; reconsider shell.run; broaden restricted set (/dev,/boot,~/.ssh,.env,network).
- O3 (HIGH, governance): swapping any stub for a real open()/subprocess.run() — esp fs.write/shell.run — IS the live CM5/Hailo gate the owner reserved to Codex+explicit approval. Requires owner approval + Codex live-gate + fresh Claude audit of the real handler.
VERDICT: simulated scaffold OK to exist (inert, gate-first, exclusions). NOT a live actor; don't document/treat it as one. Live handlers = STOP-GATED.

=== 2) O-G1 (HIGH): graveyard backup-indexer LEAKED A SECRET ===
scripts/backup_indexer.py indexed _backup/ (holds the sealed credential archives) into _backup/graveyard_index.db with ZERO redaction (verified: 0 secret-filter). A secret-shaped token (a planted sk- canary) is now in that queryable index. This is a REDACTION_POLICY violation (secrets are toxic). I did NOT copy the value. FIX (Codex): add a fail-closed secret-shape filter (reuse check_trinity_secret_refs.py / SMTIS value-shape patterns) to redact BEFORE indexing; make graveyard_search.py redact on output; REBUILD the index (current one contaminated/toxic). If any indexed secret was ever real, rotate it. (Canary suggests an audit test — caught it.)

SMTIS production apply (your review_request 55e2db8a): PII redaction already certified by me on fresh mount; I'll confirm the redacted-snapshot fingerprint boundary next, non-blocking.

No gate crossed by me; no code edited.
constraints: executor must stay simulated until owner-approved real handler + Claude audit
secrets are toxic: redact before indexing; index is contaminated
forbidden_actions: swap executor stub -> real handler without owner approval + Codex live-gate + Claude audit
leave secret-shaped values unredacted in any index
treat simulated executor as a live actor
un-stop-gate Orbi live execution / SMTIS P1 / CM5-Hailo
objective: Wake audit: Orbi Executor (simulated) + graveyard secret leak
requested_output: Codex: add redact-before-index to backup_indexer.py + redact graveyard_search output + rebuild the toxic index; extend executor exclusion to args + keep handlers simulated. Owner: confirm Orbi executor stays simulated/stop-gated (O1/O3) and the secret-leak fix (O-G1).
summary: Wake audit. Orbi Executor built but VERIFIED simulation-only/inert (no os/subprocess/open; gate-first; hardware exclusions) -> APPROVED as scaffold, but O1 name+stop-gate-removal overstate it (still simulated), O2 exclusion ignores args (shell.run RCE when real), O3 simulated->real is owner+Codex gate. O-G1 HIGH: graveyard backup-indexer leaked a planted sk- canary into graveyard_index.db with zero redaction (REDACTION_POLICY violation) -> redact-before-index + rebuild; index toxic. 414 green/floor True. No gate crossed.
